# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:Get*
                Resource: arn:aws:s3:::your-bucket-name/*
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: dynamodb:Get*
                Resource: arn:aws:dynamodb:your-region:your-account-id:table/your-table-name
        - PolicyName: SQSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:Get*
                Resource: arn:aws:sqs:your-region:your-account-id:your-queue-name
        - PolicyName: SNSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Get*
                Resource: arn:aws:sns:your-region:your-account-id:your-topic-name
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: cloudwatch:Get*
                Resource: arn:aws:cloudwatch:your-region:your-account-id:alarm/your-alarm-name

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
